items.question: What will the Wink Blog cover?
items.answer: The Blog should cover direct distribution, social commerce, Partner demand, hotel technology, AI discovery, and approved customer stories.

items.question: Is the Blog only about Wink?
items.answer: No. The Blog should explain the category and practical operating model first, then link to Wink where it helps readers act.

items.question: How should readers start?
items.answer: New readers should start with Resources, then subscribe for future Blog updates.

fields.heading: Ready to make hotel demand bookable?
fields.body: Start with the route that matches your team, then move into a focused demo or sign-up flow.
